name: Captrix timeline controls smoke
description: Checks the manual caption timeline surface and caption styling controls.

planSteps.description: data-testid=caption-timeline-scroll, data-testid=caption-segment-manual, data-testid=caption-overlay, and data-testid=video-stage are visible.
data-testid=caption-overlay and data-testid=caption-timeline-scroll remain visible after style and position changes.
